de.uka.ilkd.key.java

Class PositionInfo

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.PositionInfo

  • public class PositionInfo
extends Object
    represents a group of three Positions: relativePosition, startPosition, endPosition

      this violates immutability, but the method is only called right after the object is created...
      private static String simplifyPath(String path)
      If the path contains the substring "/../", then this method tries to simplify the path by removing this substring and the preceeding directory name to that substring.

    • Method Detail

      • simplifyPath

        private static String simplifyPath(String path)
        If the path contains the substring "/../", then this method tries to simplify the path by removing this substring and the preceeding directory name to that substring. Otherwise java.io.FileReader would have a problem. E.g. Input "/A/B/../D" - Output "/A/D"

      • getRelativePosition

        this violates immutability, but the method is only called right after the object is created...
